overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player exploring a futuristic desert urban environment. The player moves from an outdoor plaza with a digital terminal and spire monument, through an open area with smoke plumes and abandoned vehicles, and descends into a dark underpass with NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor plaza with digital terminal and monument

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the tall spire monument against the sun

agents.ego_description: walking around the digital terminal and looking up at the tall monument structure

entered.detail: teal-colored digital terminal with glowing UI displaying 'DIGIMMORTAL'
tall futuristic spire with multiple protruding spikes and teal accents
large curved futuristic building with blue glass facade
dry desert shrubs and bushes along the concrete path

segments.scene_description: The player stands near a digital terminal in a sunlit plaza, then walks around it while looking up at a towering spire monument. The environment features dry desert vegetation and futuristic architecture under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with smoke and futuristic buildings

events.description: large smoke plume becomes visible rising from buildings in the distance
passing by abandoned vehicles and dome-shaped structures

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward the area with smoke plumes

entered.detail: thick gray smoke rising from a damaged building in the distance
futuristic building with arched dome roof and purple accents
derelict vehicle with rust and damage parked on the side
modern street light pole along the path

segments.scene_description: The player walks through an open plaza with a large smoke plume visible in the distance. Abandoned cars and dome-shaped buildings line the path as the player moves away from the monument area toward the smoke.

scene_state.functional_zone: ramp leading down to covered underpass

events.description: entering the underpass ramp and leaving the open plaza
entering darker covered area with artificial ceiling lighting

agents.ego_description: walking down the concrete ramp into the underpass

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with exposed beams and fluorescent lighting
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
teal and orange automated vending machines against the wall

segments.scene_description: The player descends a ramp into a covered underpass, transitioning from bright sunlight to mixed lighting. Graffiti-covered walls and vending machines line the concrete corridor as the player moves deeper underground.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass with storage areas and NPCs

events.description: encountering two NPCs, one jumping on a box and one crouching near a panel

agents.ego_description: walking through the underpass and observing NPCs near the vending machines

notable_agents.action: character performing a parkour jump on top of a red box
character crouching near an electrical panel on the wall

entered.detail: stacked cardboard boxes and storage containers
large electrical panel with warning signs and cables
wooden storage racks with boxes and supplies
closed metal roll-up shutter door at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The player walks through the dark underpass interior, passing vending machines and storage areas. Two NPCs are seen interacting near an electrical panel—one jumping on a box and another crouching. The segment ends approaching a closed metal shutter door.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, open desert plaza into the depths of a dark, industrial underpass. It begins near a digital terminal under a clear blue sky, with the camera tilting upward to take in a towering spire monument surrounded by dry vegetation. As the player moves away from the monument, the scene opens into a wide plaza where abandoned cars and dome-shaped buildings lead toward a distant plume of smoke. The camera then descends a ramp, transitioning from the harsh sunlight into a covered concrete corridor lined with graffiti and vending machines. Finally, the movement carries deeper into the dim interior, passing NPCs interacting near an electrical panel before approaching a closed metal shutter door.
